null_spark.name: Null Spark
null_spark.description: Release a small spark of void energy that deals entropy damage and distorts accuracy.

silence_thread.name: Silence Thread
silence_thread.description: Cast a thin void filament that prevents the target from using support abilities next turn.

entropy_lash.name: Entropy Lash
entropy_lash.description: Strike with a patternless lash of entropy that delivers cold, stable damage.

void_bloom.name: Void Bloom
void_bloom.description: Bloom with null energy, eroding active buffs and weakening resistances.

collapse_step.name: Collapse Step
collapse_step.description: Shift through a collapsing point in space, increasing evasion and shedding minor disruptions.

anti_pattern_pulse.name: Anti-Pattern Pulse
anti_pattern_pulse.description: Emit a pulse of void logic that disrupts active effects and slows the target’s response.

erasure_wave.name: Erasure Wave
erasure_wave.description: Sweep the field with a wave of erasing force that removes a buff and deals entropy damage.

nullbind_seal.name: Nullbind Seal
nullbind_seal.description: Invoke a sealing glyph of void logic that prevents offensive abilities next turn.

total_collapse.name: Total Collapse
total_collapse.description: Unleash a devastating collapse of local reality, dealing massive entropy damage at the cost of instability.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Void technique reserved for future awakening.
